g.text: Cardinality Estimation — Error Propagation Through a 3-Table Join
STAGE 1 — After JOIN: A ⋈ B (First Error Multiplication)
STAGE 2 — After JOIN: (A ⋈ B) ⋈ C (Final Error Catastrophe)
Cause: skewed distribution, no MCV list
Impact | query runs 1000× slower than predicted
Pattern | errors compound exponentially with depth
Formula | err(N-table join) = Π(err_i) for i=1..N
Correct order: filter small tables first
Wrong order: large × large = exponential blowup
Fix: run ANALYZE after bulk data loads
